hook.summary: First-person POV poker game featuring The Simpsons characters.
hook.visual_action: The player reveals two aces in their hand while sitting at a poker table with Homer and Bart.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Aces. Let's see what you've got.

scene_flow: First-person perspective of a poker game with iconic animated characters.
The dealer reveals cards on a casino table.
A character celebrates winning with a pair of aces.
Cinematic transition to a grand stage with bright lights.
Final logo reveal with app store download links.
audience_proxy: Adult fans of The Simpsons who enjoy casual poker or casino games.
